productDisplayName: Esprit Men White Dial Chronograph Watch
description: Style Note Taking a traditional design and giving it a modern twist is what makes esprit watches timeless timepieces. Contemporary and trendy, this is an affordable timepiece with an exquisite design that highlights your individuality. Product Details Case style: Stainless steel round case Dial style: White dial with white hands Strap style: Steel strap with a butterfly clasp Features: 3-faced chronograph display, date aperture on the dial, branding on the dial and screw to reset time Waterproof to 10 BAR, wearable around sinks, during swimming, poolside diving but not highboard diving and surfing Size Case diameter: 45 mm Case thickness: 5 mm
